query: 2026 FIFA World Cup group stage results goals scored so far June 2026
answer:
# 2026 FIFA World Cup Group Stage Results & Goals Scored (as of June 17, 2026)

## Tournament Overview

The 2026 FIFA World Cup — the first-ever 48-team edition — is currently underway across the United States, Canada, and Mexico. The group stage began on **June 11, 2026**, and Matchday 1 is wrapping up as of today (June 17). The tournament features **12 groups of 4 teams** (Groups A–L), with 24 total Matchday 1 fixtures. The final is scheduled for **July 19 at MetLife Stadium** in East Rutherford, New Jersey.

---

## Confirmed Matchday 1 Results (June 11–17, 2026)

### Group A
| Date | Match | Score | Venue |
|------|-------|-------|-------|
| June 11 | **Mexico vs South Africa** | **2–0** | Estadio Azteca, Mexico City |
| June 11 | **South Korea vs Czech Republic** | **2–1** | TBC |

### Group B
| Date | Match | Score |
|------|-------|-------|
| June 12–13 | **Canada vs Bosnia & Herzegovina** | **1–1** |
| June 12–13 | **Qatar vs Switzerland** | **1–1** |

### Group D
| Date | Match | Score | Venue | Goal Scorers |
|------|-------|-------|-------|--------------|
| June 12 | **USA vs Paraguay** | **4–1** | SoFi Stadium, Inglewood, CA | Balogun ×2, Bobadilla OG, Reyna |
| June 13–14 | **Australia vs Turkey** | **2–0** | BC Place, Vancouver | Irankunda, Metcalfe |

### Group G
| Date | Match | Score |
|------|-------|-------|
| June 15 | **Belgium vs Egypt** | **1–1** |
| June 15 | **Iran vs New Zealand** | **2–2** |

### Group H
| Date | Match | Score | Venue | Goal Scorers |
|------|-------|-------|-------|--------------|
| June 15 | **Spain vs Cape Verde** | **0–0** | Atlanta |  — |
| June 15 | **Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay** | **1–1** | Hard Rock Stadium, Miami | Al-Amri 41'; Araujo 80' |

> **Note:** Results for Groups C, E, F, I, J, K, and L were not yet available in the sources consulted. Several Matchday 1 fixtures are still being played on June 16–17.

---

## Total Goals Scored (from 10 confirmed matches)

| Match | Goals |
|-------|-------|
| Mexico 2–0 South Africa | 2 |
| South Korea 2–1 Czech Republic | 3 |
| Canada 1–1 Bosnia & Herzegovina | 2 |
| Qatar 1–1 Switzerland | 2 |
| USA 4–1 Paraguay | 5 |
| Australia 2–0 Turkey | 2 |
| Belgium 1–1 Egypt | 2 |
| Iran 2–2 New Zealand | 4 |
| Spain 0–0 Cape Verde | 0 |
| Saudi Arabia 1–1 Uruguay | 2 |
| **TOTAL** | **24 goals** |

**Average: 2.4 goals per match** across the 10 confirmed results. This is a partial count — there are 24 Matchday 1 fixtures total (2 per group × 12 groups), so roughly 14 additional match results remain unconfirmed.

---

---

## Early Top Scorers

| Player | Team | Goals |
|--------|------|-------|
| **Folarin Balogun** | USA | **2** |
| Irankunda | Australia | 1 |
| Metcalfe | Australia | 1 |
| Giovanni Reyna | USA | 1 |
| Abdulelah Al-Amri | Saudi Arabia | 1 |
| Maximiliano Araujo | Uruguay | 1 |

Balogun leads confirmed scorers with 2 goals in the USA's 4–1 win over Paraguay.

---

## Notable Records & Statistics

- **Opening match red card record:** 3 red cards were shown in Mexico 2–0 South Africa (June 11) — the most in any World Cup opening match in history. Two South Africans (Sithole 49', Zwane 84') and one Mexican (Montes 90+2') were dismissed.
- **USA's historic win:** The 4–1 victory over Paraguay was described as the highest single-match goal tally for the USMNT at a World Cup.
- **Spain 0–0 Cape Verde:** Widely described as an early shock — Cape Verde (FIFA ranking ~67th) are World Cup debutants, benefiting from the expanded 48-team format.
- **Turkey's return:** Their loss to Australia marked their first World Cup match since 2002 (when they finished 3rd).
- **Tournament firsts:** First 48-team World Cup, first with 3 host nations, first with a Round of 32 stage, and a record 104 total matches.

---

## Data Limitations

- Full results for Groups C, E, F, I, J, K, and L were not yet available.
- The 24-goal total is from only 10 of 24 Matchday 1 fixtures — the tournament-wide total is likely significantly higher.
- Attendance data was limited (62,764 confirmed for Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay at Hard Rock Stadium).

key_facts: The 2026 FIFA World Cup (first-ever 48-team edition) kicked off June 11, 2026 across the USA, Canada, and Mexico, with 12 groups of 4 teams.
As of June 17, 2026, Matchday 1 is wrapping up; confirmed results are available for 10 of 24 Matchday 1 fixtures (Groups A, B, D, G, H).
From 10 confirmed Matchday 1 matches, 24 total goals have been scored — an average of 2.4 goals per match.
USA defeated Paraguay 4–1 at SoFi Stadium (Group D), the highest single-match USMNT World Cup goal tally. Folarin Balogun scored twice.
The opening match (Mexico 2–0 South Africa, June 11) saw 3 red cards — a record for a World Cup opening match.
Spain drew 0–0 with World Cup debutants Cape Verde (Group H), widely regarded as an early upset.
Group B and Group H both have all four teams level on 1 point after all-draw Matchday 1 results.
Folarin Balogun (USA) leads confirmed scorers with 2 goals after Matchday 1.
Turkey returned to the World Cup for the first time since 2002 but lost 2–0 to Australia.
Cape Verde became the first team from the Cape Verdean islands to play in a FIFA World Cup.
The tournament features 104 total matches, a Round of 32 knockout stage (starting June 28), and the final at MetLife Stadium on July 19.
Betting market favorites as of June 15: Spain (+514, ~16.3%), France (+521, ~16.1%), Portugal (+818, ~10.9%).
